query:
UPDATE portfolioTransactions pt
JOIN fxRates fx ON DATE(pt.transactionDate) = fx.date AND fx.currencyPair = 'USDCHF'
SET pt.fxRate = fx.rate,
    pt.totalAmountCHF = CAST(pt.totalAmount AS DECIMAL(20,2)) * CAST(fx.rate AS DECIMAL(10,4))
WHERE pt.currency = 'USD';
